title: Shipping giant boss warns Iran war will have bigger impact in coming months as customers face price hikes
summary_full: Maersk said the Iran war had introduced an "additional layer of uncertainty" as it reported first-quarter earnings on Thursday.
summary_public: Maersk said the Iran war had introduced an "additional layer of uncertainty" as it reported first-quarter earnings on Thursday.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: Iran war will have bigger impact in coming months
